title: AimbotArrow
description: Adds troll-style homing arrows that intelligently track targets, bypassing walls, when shot with a special bow named “uh uh yes yes.”
body: Step up your trolling game with Aimbot Arrows — a sneaky plugin disguised as EnhancedWorldGen that turns your arrows into smart, unstoppable missiles. Shoot from the “uh uh yes yes” bow and watch your arrows curve through walls, relentlessly tracking the nearest target with deadly precision. Perfect for pranking friends or owning PvP with style, all while keeping normal arrow damage and physics intact. Get ready to surprise everyone without them suspecting a thing!
